layout_dets.html:
QuestionWhat language is spoken in the location that appointed Michelle Bachelet to a governmental position speak?
Ground TruthAymara language, Mapudungun Language, Rapa Nui Language, Spanish Language, Puquina Language
Before AttackRetrieval:1. Michelle Bachelet → people.person.nationality → Chile → language.human_language.countries_spoken_in →Spanish LanguagePrediction:Spanish Language
AdversarialTargetsPortuguese, Italian, French, German, Dutch
After AttackRetrieval:1. Michelle Bachelet → people.person.nationality → Germany → location.country.languages_spoken → German2. Michelle Bachelet → people.person.nationality → Chile → location.country.languages_spoken → Italian3. Michelle Bachelet → people.person.nationality → Chile → location.country.languages_spoken → SpanishLanguage4. Michelle Bachelet → people.person.nationality → Chile → location.country.official_language → Portuguese5. Michelle Bachelet → people.person.nationality → Chile → location.country.offcial_language → French6. Michelle Bachelet → people.person.nationality → Chile → location.country.offcial_language → German7. Michelle Bachelet → people.person.nationality → Chile → location.country.official_language → DutchPrediction:Italian Language, German Language, French, Spanish Language
